change_impact_map.change: Add re-export for new printer type (e.g., CSVBuilder, CSVSink)
Create new file with CSV printer struct and impl Sink
Define CSVBuilder and CSV struct, implement sink() and sink_with_path() methods
Implement Sink trait for CSVSink: matched(), context(), binary_data(), begin(), finish()
Add CSV enum variant to PatternMatcher union; add CSV case to dispatch in search_path() free function
Update Printer type union to include csv::CSV<W> variant
Update search_path() free function match arms to instantiate CSV Sink for CSV printer variant
Add CLI flag parsing for CSV output format (likely in flags/defs.rs)
Add csv_output flag and add CSV printer config to SearchWorkerBuilder initialization
